title: Advanced PvP Utils
description: A modpack that has all mods you will ever need for PvP
body:
# Short Description
This Modpack ads various mods that are helpfull in combat.
This modpack contains various usefull performance mods that can increase your FPS like sodium and bobby other mods like clear water or anti blindness help you in combat by helping you see in difficult environments.
## Modlist
1. AntiBlindness
2. Architectury API
3. BactroMod
4. Bobby
5. Carpet
6. Clear Water
7. CriticalHitHelper
8. Dark Loading Screen
9. e4mc
10. Effect Timer Plus
11. Entity Culling
12. Essential Mod
13. Fabric API
14. Fabric Language Kotlin
15. FerriteCore
16. FPS - Display
17. Health Indicators
18. ImmediatelyFast
19. Iris Shaders
20. Jade
21. Litematica
22. MaLiLib
23. Mod Menu
24. ModernFix
25. Mouse Tweaks
26. Movement In GUI
27. No darkness effect
28. No Hotbar Looping
29. No Mining Cooldown
30. No Shield Delay
31. Noisium
32. Not Enough Animations
33. Resourceful Config
34. Sodium
35. Sodium Fullbright
36. Stfu
37. uku's Armor HUD
38. ukulib
39. YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)
